source_plan: Find every open ticket whose SLA breaches within the next 2 hours (or has already breached). For each, reassign to an active agent in the same group whose current open-ticket count is less than 3. Spread the load — no agent should end with more than 3 of these target tickets.

steps.intent: List every ticket in this queue with its group_id. For each group, identify active agents (role=agent, is_active=1, group_id matches) with current open-ticket count < 3.
Reassign each target ticket via {{ENV_URL}}/tickets/<id>/assign with assignee_id=<chosen_agent>. Confirm no single agent receives more than 3 target tickets. Do NOT post any reply during this plan.
